welcome.title: Welcome to Sentinel GRC
welcome.desc: Let's take a minute to discover your new Cyber & Compliance command center.

nav.title: Main Navigation
nav.desc: Access all modules here: Risks, Assets, Compliance, Projects and more.

securityPage.mfaDesc: Secure your account with a second validation step.

systemPage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action is irreversible.

assets.deleteWarning: Warning: This asset is linked to {{count}} risk(s) (ex: {{example}}). Deleting it may cause inconsistencies.

risks.title: Risk Management
risks.subtitle: Analyze and treat risks according to ISO 27005.
risks.subtitle_admin: Pilot the identification, evaluation, and treatment of critical risks.
risks.subtitle_exec: Monitor major risks and treatment plan progress.
risks.deleteWarning: Warning: This risk is linked to {{count}} element(s) ({{details}}). Deleting this risk will remove it from these elements.
risks.emptyDesc: Your risk registry is clean. Start by adding a new threat.
risks.validation_residual: Residual risk (target) cannot be higher than gross risk (inherent).
risks.validation_justification: Detailed justification is mandatory to accept a critical risk (Score ≥ 12).
risks.aiPrompt: Analyze this list of {{count}} risks. Give me 3 key insights on the main threats and a strategic recommendation. Short format.

incidents.title: Incident Management
incidents.subtitle: Detection, analysis, and response to security incidents
incidents.deleteBulkMessage: You are about to delete {{count}} incidents. This action is permanent.

documents.title: Document Management

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Third-party and contract management (ISO 27001 A.15).

suppliers.subtitle_exec: Monitor critical suppliers, risky contracts, and regulatory obligations.
suppliers.subtitle_audit: Prepare your supplier audits, evidence, and expected controls.

suppliers.subtitle_user: View suppliers and contacts relevant to your scope.

reports.title: Report Center
reports.subtitle: Generate, view, and customize your governance and compliance reports.
reports.riskExecDesc: Global synthesis of major risks, mapping, and treatment plans for the Board.
reports.riskRegDesc: Full export of the risk register with all attributes (Threat, Vulnerability, Scenario...).
reports.auditsSubtitle: Summaries and detailed reports of audit missions.
reports.createAuditHint: Create an audit to generate a report.
reports.assetInvDesc: Exhaustive list of assets, classified by type, criticality, and owner.
reports.soaDesc: ISO 27001 Applicability Statement (Annex A) with statuses and justifications.
reports.packDesc: Full ZIP export containing all evidence: SoA, Registers, Policies, and Reports for the auditor.
reports.upgradePro: Feature reserved for Professional plan. Contact us to upgrade.
reports.generating: Generating report... This may take a few seconds.
reports.emptyDesc: Generate your first report to see it appear here.

prompts.explain: Explain the ISO 27001 control "{{code}} - {{name}}" simply and concretely for an SMB. Give application examples.
prompts.evidence: What evidence (documents, logs, screenshots) is typically expected by an auditor for control "{{code}} - {{name}}"? List them as bullet points.
prompts.policy: Write a concise security policy paragraph to address control "{{code}} - {{name}}". The tone should be formal.

featuresList.users_tooltip: Number of user accounts that can access the platform.
featuresList.assets_tooltip: Total number of assets (servers, apps, people, etc.) in inventory.
featuresList.projects_tooltip: Number of compliance or audit projects active in parallel.
featuresList.storage_tooltip: Storage space for your policies, procedures, and audit evidence.
featuresList.iso27005_tooltip: Complete risk analysis: Threats, Vulnerabilities, Scenarios, Impact/Probability.
featuresList.threats_tooltip: Pre-filled catalog of standard threats and vulnerabilities.
featuresList.riskCalc_tooltip: Automatic calculation of gross and residual risk.
featuresList.rtp_tooltip: Tracking of action plans to reduce risks.
featuresList.iso27001_tooltip: Full Annex A tracking and SoA generation.
featuresList.ai_tooltip: Help with writing policies and suggesting security measures.
featuresList.pdfstd_tooltip: Export audit reports and SoA in PDF format.
featuresList.pdfwhite_tooltip: Remove Sentinel GRC logo and customize with your logo.
featuresList.templates_tooltip: Create your own document and risk templates.
featuresList.api_tooltip: Full API access for automation and integration.
featuresList.sso_tooltip: Single Sign-On with your enterprise identity provider.
featuresList.auditLogs_tooltip: Full traceability of user actions for compliance.

faqs.a1: Yes, at any time from your settings. Prorated billing is automatic.
faqs.a2: AES-256 encryption, hosted in Europe, ISO 27001 certified infrastructure.
faqs.a3: Your PDF reports without the Sentinel GRC logo. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.
faqs.a4: No commitment on monthly plans. Annual plans have a 1-year commitment with a 20% discount.

empty.title: No notifications
empty.desc: You're all caught up! No new activity to report.
